brief: Fase A: schema fb_* + RLS owner-only + trigger updated_at/cost-versioning + funzioni fb_explode_menu/fb_menu_foodcost (SECURITY INVOKER) + UI /fb/ingredienti /fb/ricette /fb/menu. Aggancio food cost->margine via fb_menus.service_id. Story1 backend(schema+rls+funzioni). Story2 UI. Story3 verifica isolamento+calcolo numerico.

goals.title: FB Food Cost Fase A
goals.objective: Ricettario + food cost per le Location (PRP-4 Fase A)
